interactions.described_action: activity-dependent exocytosis enriches surface pools with GluA1-containing AMPARs during LTP

interactions.confidence_note: Text describes the process of enrichment but does not specify the direct molecular machinery responsible for the exocytosis.

interactions.described_action: endocytosis depletes surface AMPARs during LTD
